conversation.content: Hey Aru! It's been a while since we talked. How are things?

I've been settling into my new internship at Tesla Autopilot in Palo Alto since leaving SAIL, though I'm just finishing my last day of antibiotics for food poisoning today. The sunny weather has been perfect for my weekend surfing trips at Pacifica while I get ready for Tokyo in August.

It's been about six weeks, so tell me—is the Tesla Autopilot gig as cool as it sounds, and did your non-veg meal prepping actually cause that food poisoning? I'm currently just trying to figure out why my cat is staring at a blank wall, but I'm glad you're finally well enough to hit those Pacifica waves!

Tesla Autopilot is incredible since I left SAIL, and I'm really enjoying life in Palo Alto despite the food poisoning from my recent chicken meal prep. Today is my last day of antibiotics, so I'm finally feeling healthy enough to get back to my assignments and weekend surfing at Pacifica.
